name: engineering-quality-skills
description: Add focused correctness review, test review, and systematic debugging skills.
docs: Register the installed skills in AGENTS.md or the target repo's equivalent capability registry.
Keep project-specific severity labels, authorization boundaries, and verification commands authoritative.
Retain upstream source metadata and MIT license files when redistributing the skills.
verify: Confirm each SKILL.md has valid frontmatter and matches its directory name.
Confirm every copied skill retains its LICENSE file and pinned source revision.
Run the target repo's normal documentation or quality checks.
notes: The skills are vendored from cniska/skills revision 7d79c7754f2b9d656f7db7b9ecefcb7532b6d256.
The debug skill is adapted to avoid depending on a separate /plan skill.
Do not overwrite stronger project-local review or debugging guidance.
